constructive_proposals: establish the truth of this world
unmask self-estrangement in its unholy forms
move around himself as his own true Sun
fashion reality like a man who has discarded illusions

scapegoat.name: religion
attributes: universal basis of consolation and justification
scapegoat.justification: Religion is portrayed as an illusory construct created by man that obscures his true reality, sustains oppression through false comfort, and must be discarded to achieve real happiness and self-actualization.

moral_justification: Man must liberate himself from religious illusion to reclaim his true reality and agency; religion is a tool of oppression maintained by inverted social structures that must be overcome through materialist critique.
summary: The text deconstructs religion as an ideological superstructure rooted in alienated human existence, condemning it as a source of false consciousness and oppression while calling for the establishment of earthly truth and self-emancipation through materialist philosophy.
